PVT Interrupt

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x10
Size:
0x4
Source:
pvt_rf.rdl

Description

Interrupt status and clear. pvt_core_intr is set when output data is valid. Write 2 (pvt_int_clr=1) to clear the interrupt and de-assert pvt_enable.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:2] reserved rw 0x0 -
[1] pvt_int_clr w 0x0 pvt_int_clr
[0] pvt_core_intr r 0x0 pvt_core_intr

Field Descriptions

pvt_int_clr - pvt_int_clr

Write 1 to clear interrupt and de-assert pvt_enable.

pvt_core_intr - pvt_core_intr

PVT interrupt. Set to 1 when output data is valid.
